title: [FIXED!] Small Swords for PVP
description: A resource pack that make swords smaller for PVP
body:
## Small Swords

**Small Swords** is a simple texture packs made for reduce size of all swords of Minecraft for reduce the size its take on the screen.

Enjoy!

![Here is a screenshot in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xfaNVaoo/images/0a6b1ac83729f3fae75bcd9bd30769a927dce658.png)A simple resource pack that modify all swords to make it smaller for PVP or BedWars.

# How to install
## Minecraft Launcher
- Press Windows+R and type "%appdata%"
- Go to .minecraft > resourcepack (if the resourcepack folder dont exist, create one)
- Put the Resource pack file into this folder
